original_prompt: Seamlessly integrated into the provided background scene, occupying the upper-left of the frame, Audrey Hepburn, an elderly man, is depicted wearing a blue polo shirt with white trim, blue jeans, and clear-rimmed glasses. Standing immediately to his right, in the middle-right of the frame, is Simon Bolivar, a middle-aged woman, adorned in a red button-down linen dress, small pearl earrings, and a dark bracelet, holding a Dior Sauvage perfume bottle; they are standing next to each other. Anchored in the bottom-center foreground, positioned below the elderly man and below and slightly in front of the middle-aged woman, is Ada Lovelace, a small boy, wearing a yellow t-shirt with a red emblem, proudly holding a Gundam model kit. Both the elderly man and the middle-aged woman are looking at the small boy, with the woman also sitting near him. Photorealistic subjects, sharp focus on characters, natural lighting.
